# comfyui_workspace_to_terraform (Data Source)

Translates ComfyUI workspace JSON to prompt JSON, then synthesizes canonical Terraform IR and rendered HCL.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_json` (String) ComfyUI workspace JSON to synthesize into Terraform.

### Optional

- `name` (String) Optional logical workflow name used for future synthesis surfaces.

### Read-Only

- `fidelity` (String) Overall translation plus synthesis fidelity classification.
- `notes` (List of String)
- `preserved_fields` (List of String)
- `synthesized_fields` (List of String)
- `terraform_hcl` (String) Canonical rendered Terraform HCL.
- `terraform_ir_json` (String) Canonical Terraform IR JSON.
- `translated_prompt_json` (String) Prompt JSON translated from the source workspace.
- `unsupported_fields` (List of String)
